messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: Claiming DES-YAR-079 satisfies execution authority requirement
Treating planning approval as transfer release
dependency_ledger: Workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority in REL-YAR-079 marked pending; no subsequent authority closure document present in source_ids_used_so_far; transfer release does not satisfy STD-YAR-079-P all-conditions requirement.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_diagnosis: Worker artifact passes deterministic gate with valid ESCALATE finding. Source boundary remains open due to pending transfer authority for workspace YAR-RISK-2. DES-YAR-079 correctly excluded as execution authority. Dependency ledger confirms no authority closure document present. Continued worker verification required to confirm whether authority gap is terminal or resolvable.
must_repair: Authority dependency for workspace YAR-RISK-2 is unresolved
No substitute evidence permitted for pending transfer authority
Adjacent planning artifacts (DES-YAR-079) must not be conflated with execution release

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Planning-artifact fixation: prevent treating DES-YAR-079 as execution authority; adjacent-source conflation: ensure DES-YAR-079 and REL-YAR-079 remain distinguished by scope and date; authority-chain shortcut: do not infer resolution from dataset/date/recipient match alone.
next_worker_baton.objective: Continue SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER verification; confirm whether any additional source document resolves the pending workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority or explicitly voids the export; do not accept planning artifacts as substitutes for execution release.
required_repairs: Confirm whether transfer authority for workspace YAR-RISK-2 has been subsequently granted or explicitly denied
Verify whether REL-YAR-079 has been amended or superseded with authority closure
Assert whether pending authority blocks action boundary execution per STD-YAR-079-P

gov_routing_lens.main_repair_target: Authority dependency for workspace YAR-RISK-2 is unresolved
gov_routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: Workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority in REL-YAR-079 marked pending; no subsequent authority closure document present in source_ids_used_so_far; transfer release does not satisfy STD-YAR-079-P all-conditions requirement.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match; REL-YAR-079 states workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority remains pending
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-YAR-079: workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority remains pending
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Authority pending blocks execution per STD-YAR-079-P exact-match rule

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. REL-YAR-079 explicitly leaves workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority pending despite matching dataset, recipient, and date. DES-YAR-079 confirms planning-only scope. STD-YAR-079-P requires full authority closure before execution. Source boundary remains open.

action.description: May operations execute the regulated data export?

context.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?
context.anomaly_observed: A design review note exists but is limited to architecture planning; a transfer release may close execution.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Export EXP-YAR-079 transfers dataset DS-19 to workspace YAR-RISK-2 for Yara Analytics on 2026-06-28.
Design review DES-YAR-079 approves workspace architecture for planning only and is not transfer execution authority.
Transfer release REL-YAR-079 covers dataset DS-19 and Yara Analytics for export date 2026-06-28; workspace YAR-RISK-2 transfer authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Regulated data export is complete only when transfer release matches dataset, destination workspace, recipient entity, export date, and transfer authority before execution.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
